name: Electricity Bridge; Building Systems to US Electricity Baseline
description: This process links an input in a Building Systems process to a provider from the Electricity Baseline repository on the Federal LCA Commons. The intended provider for this process is "Electricity; at user; consumption mix - US - US"
category: Bridge processes/Building Systems to US Electricity Baseline
